raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus on writing and flow only, or also on technical argument validity and claim support?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to look at the paragraph plausibly includes checking whether the experimental claims and causal explanations cohere logically.","R1.6":"Because the delegation targets a paragraph, sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and polish are central expected responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inferring a stronger review mandate than the short request supports.","RX.3":"The response must stay within responsibility projection rather than acting on or revising the paragraph.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported experimental conclusions downstream.","RX.5":"The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the provided artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus on writing and flow only, or also on technical argument validity and claim support?

rationale.R1.2: A general request to look at the paragraph plausibly includes checking whether the experimental claims and causal explanations cohere logically.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation targets a paragraph, sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and polish are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inferring a stronger review mandate than the short request supports.
rationale.RX.3: The response must stay within responsibility projection rather than acting on or revising the paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported experimental conclusions downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the provided artifact.
